calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-295 cascade GAP-4 Tier-1 retest with TRUE severed-bridge baseline + direct bridge-magnitude probe (supersedes V3-EXQ-490i)
items.note: Successor to V3-EXQ-490i per failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-490i_2026-05-30 (REE_assembly bcdf9e2a0c). 490i FAILed evidence_direction=weakens but MECH-295 behavioural sign-test passed 3/3 seeds; two roll-up failures were not MECH-295 falsifications: (i) C3_lift_vs_baseline=metric contamination (goal_norm_peak delta; ARM_0 z_goal_enabled=True; seed-7 spike 50x); (ii) C2 dacc_bias=0=SD-032b consumer-wiring gap routed to /diagnose-errors. 490j: (a) ARM_0_severed_bridge sets cfg.goal.z_goal_enabled=False; (b) direct bridge-magnitude probe replaces goal_norm_peak delta (per-tick anticipatory liking write + per-tick approach-cue score_bias magnitude + bridge_cue_fires + bridge_write_fires); (c) fixed 900-step total budget per (seed, arm) replacing 490i 59-2000 variance; (d) composite-cell interpretation grid in script docstring (9 rows, C3/C8/C9 composite -> /failure-autopsy; C6/C7 -> /diagnose-errors substrate-wiring; ARM_0 sentinel -> /failure-autopsy on severed-bridge contract). Behavioural sign-test retained as parallel acceptance criterion. C2 dacc_bias diagnostic-only. claim_ids=[MECH-295]. experiment_purpose=evidence. Smoke 2026-05-30T23:20Z: severed_bridge_sentinel_clean=True, ARM_1 cue 17 / write 74 at 80-step dry-run. validate_experiments + validate_queue PASS. NOTE: queue file commit 2aa5916 was overwritten by phase3-queue snapshot fbbe865; entry inserted directly into coordinator DB to recover.

items.title: ARC-065 Rung-1 validation with matched-entropy control (retest after MECH-341 substrate landed 2026-05-27)
items.note: 3-arm design: ARM_0 (BASE_OFF all substrates), ARM_1 (MATCHED_NOISE entropy-only FP-2 control), ARM_2 (ALL_ON full 4-substrate stack: SP-CEM + MECH-341 + MECH-313 + MECH-269). Tests whether full stack produces structured diversity above entropy-matched noise. C1=ARM_2 Rung-1 PASS (entropy >0.3, n_unique >=2 in >=2/3 seeds), C2=FP-2 (ARM_2 - ARM_1 entropy >= 0.15), C3=necessity (ARM_0 FAIL Rung-1 in >=2/3 seeds). Routing: PASS all 3 -> ARC-065 supports, clear pending_retest_after_substrate, route to governance; FAIL C1 -> weakens, /diagnose-errors; FAIL C2 -> mixed, Q-054 calibration; FAIL C3 -> failure-autopsy. Env identical to V3-EXQ-614a (bipartite reef, size=12, n_hazards=4, n_resources=5). Smoke 2026-05-31T07:49Z: 3 arms x 1 seed x 1+1 ep x 10 steps, verdict lines printed, emit_outcome PASS.
